terms.definition: Data model for scenario slices, steps, choices, terminal options, transitions, and source citations.
A focused workflow map subset for one user scenario, rendered independently from other scenarios.
The user journey of choosing a first command, reading output conditions, then choosing subsequent commands or exits.
A secondary route from a closing node into stop, quality, knowledge capture, or another scenario path.
A source reference showing which maestro-flow artifact supports a command fact or sequence semantic.
Internal validation prompts that test whether users can choose command sequences from scenario states.
